questions: How does AI‑powered measurement improve ROI decisions?
What should marketers do amid signal loss?
qa.answer: AI‑powered modeling and conversion enhancements help recover signal, while experiments anchor accuracy. Combine modeled conversions, enhanced conversions, and incrementality testing to guide allocation.
implication: Enable enhanced conversions/CAPI; maintain consent‑aware data flows.
Run ongoing lift tests; calibrate models (MMM/MTA) against experiments.
Use unified KPIs and decision rules to reallocate on marginal ROI.
